description: Declares all expected hooks. Self-orient validates checksums against actual files.

infrastructure.name: hook_log
infrastructure.purpose: Shared execution logger — context manager for hook telemetry

hooks.name: session-start-orient
hooks.purpose: Auto-orient with org system context at session start

hooks.name: user-prompt-context
hooks.purpose: Project-aware context injection on prompt keywords

hooks.name: pre-compact-preserve
hooks.purpose: Extract critical threads before context compaction

hooks.name: stop-maintenance-check
hooks.purpose: Maintenance vigilance check before session stop

hooks.name: post-edit-verify
hooks.purpose: Verify JSON/YAML syntax after file writes

hooks.name: notify-windows
hooks.purpose: Windows toast notifications for Claude Code events

hooks.name: mcp-observe
hooks.purpose: Log examen MCP tool invocations for governance visibility
